{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011423A9259A88EE83E41A89D6"}"},"total":5504},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7334285326062797593","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比妻荣夫贵有看头，那就是重复再重复，周而复始，拖拖拉拉好些年，混数字的，都让人看的疲乏了。这本挺好的，情节一环扣一环，特别想一直追到完结。一口气追平，等更！！！作者大大辛苦啦！新年快乐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707648564,"group_id":"7314313176613407806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最想要的就是枕边书，庭前花。朝迎晨曦，暮送夕阳。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8iVwkuHacGCPvfGmqcbyPRzP0hDvAHFtJZRB0EUJi38","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/200878ccd3964ffc843e78706eab419f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793547&x-signature=wC7fOf9DcO4wAmfdY8Bz3U3gLFc%3D","user_id":"2532873921109566","user_name":"执篇的倔姑凉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2532873921109566","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7314313176613407806","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+异世大陆+狩猎种植+炼药+炼器】

          天赋不够，气运来凑。

         十风大陆，一年三季，暖季、汛季和寒季，二十四个月，男子觉醒为武灵师，狩猎异兽；女子觉醒为辅灵师，炼药、炼器和种植。

       穿成十风大陆被异兽拱死的废材少女，宋榴花本以为自己能获得金手指，击穿地心。没想到第一次测试就被打脸，从此开启了在十风大陆的躺平人生。

       一天内，完成了人生大事，早上被退婚，上午拐个俊美青年成亲。

       垃圾天赋时常让她觉得与这个世界格格不入，一丝不苟练出来的都是废物。于是她决定开摆式炼制，这搞里头，那搞里头，什么？还要控火？随便了，大火小火看心情。干巴了，加点水就是。在第N次失败后，得到一锅恶心的绿色液体，本以为除了恶心，只剩恶心，没想到还能修复破裂的灵府。

      宋榴花：看不起我你是心高气傲，等我炼器你是生死难料。随便炼炼，不是垃圾就是绝品。你嘲笑我天赋垃圾，我失败数次，炼出大杀器。

       野外狩猎，女眷孩童挖野菜、抢灵芝，宋榴花揣着小手四处游荡，随随便便摸个鱼，逮个兔，气运无敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/75494a7ff05d68af7aa3192e447acffd","author":"花椒猴","author_id":"","book_id":"7314313176613407806","book_name":"废材辅灵师：打死也不挖野菜","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8c0b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7314313247228707390","read_count":"49498","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"820714"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"384","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3b50dc32b09d32854ef03047d0bb2e1d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383663&x-signature=EI8GE6jhYULWLfsM12LhgL8pvMw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"844886102507688","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011423A9259A88EE83E41A89D6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15034,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25796,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":28284},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7326558114495873842","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这么好看分低了，看过类似的是穿到星际的男女主作风和事件都差不多，但看到这目前喜欢这本，星际文很多不喜欢的地方这里都没了，女主性格更讨喜，作者快写啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705847916,"group_id":"7314313176613407806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好人就要做该有钱的神…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9DV7l8KkDF00s2ozHXlPnXepxkOFJDuqwXIBk7w8/4N","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7aa76965127e41c9a666186068a07157~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793300&x-signature=BfVXpNu9u27OWRT%2F1b%2B%2BqL2tLP4%3D","user_id":"4277517816963628","user_name":"世上无缘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4277517816963628","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7314313176613407806","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+异世大陆+狩猎种植+炼药+炼器】

花椒猴 作
剧情新鲜，内容丰富，也没有什么特别不合理的地方，言情部分写的也很甜。
人物形象都很立体。
新书幼苗，五星好评。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705563719,"group_id":"7314313176613407806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"低徊愧人子，不敢叹风尘。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N22PDUNVYZH4Sjhtozyxz/k4duvLUdho8tcC9vdK0Orq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa4e05f02a5442e1a6b4f3b48fae9ab2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793744&x-signature=kwBLJAin0gJAnlmGKuVWXuS4i3s%3D","user_id":"4182960349653693","user_name":"兔子先生在流浪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182960349653693","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739998634,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7314313176613407806","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+异世大陆+狩猎种植+炼药+炼器】
